title: MC STADT 1
description: MC CITY 1 is a technical modpack with Create and many other mods.
body:
MC CITY 1 is a technical modpack with Create and many other mods.
Now MC STADT is going into the first round (first season) there will be a new MC STADT every year.
With these mods you can, for example, build automated farms and elevators. There is also a mod that allows you to transport boxes from one place to another.
We also have new gears for the Create Mod. There are a lot of things you can do in the modpack. Among other things, we have added the Oculus mod for shaders. There are many ways to generate electricity (kinetic energy).
One of them would be to build a wind turbine or to build a water wheel.
As you may have already noticed, there are many options. There are also many tutorials on YouTube where the Create Mod and other mods from this modpack are explained. It's best if you just try it out yourself.
Mod list: 
- Alex's Mobs
- AppleSkin
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Carry on
- Citadel
- CraftTweaker
- Create
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create Deco
- Create: Extends Cogwheels
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Farmer's Delight
- GraveStone Mod [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod)
- Iron Chests
- JourneyMap
- Just Enough Items
- Macaw's Bridges [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges)
- Macaw's Doors
- Macaw's Fences and Walls
- Macaw's Furniture
- Macaw's Trapdoors
- Macaw's Windows
- Mouse Tweaks
- Oculus
- Quark [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)
- Simple Voice Chat
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Sophisticated Core
- Storage Drawers
- TerraBlender (Forge)
- Zeta
